fields.Name: Agent Memory Cleanup - Daily at 3 AM UTC
fields.Description: [Deprecated] Archival of stale notes and examples is now handled by the Memory Manager agent's decay-based archival phase (MemoryManagerAgent.decayBasedArchival), which uses importance-weighted Ebbinghaus decay instead of fixed retention windows. This scheduled job is disabled to prevent the deprecated Memory Cleanup Agent from running on its original 3 AM UTC cron and duplicating work. The MemoryCleanupAgent class is retained as @deprecated for reference and rollback. To rollback to retention-based archival, set Status back to 'Active' and disable the decay phase in MemoryManagerAgent.

Configuration.InitialMessage: Archive stale notes and examples based on retention policies
